arts.ttl: Premier League giants line up move for 28-year-old Barcelona attacker
arts.sum: Barcelona attacker Raphinha has been linked with a move away from the club. The Spanish side have had to go through problems when it comes to the registration of Dani Olmo, and they need to sort out the registration of the Spaniard quickly. According to TBR Football, Barcelona have struggled to register Olmo this season […] The post Premier League giants line up move for 28-year-old Barcelona attacker appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Simeone ‘really, really likes’ how Barca play under Flick
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid coach Diego Simeone has been full of praise for Barcelona and the way the Catalans are playing under new manager Hansi Flick . The two teams are due to meet in La Liga next weekend in a big clash at the top of the table, and Simeone says the Catalans are playing some great stuff this season.
